title: Spring leasing gains traction as apartment supply pressure eases
Rent growth is positive for the month of May
article_text_sample: Apartment watch National News Facebook Twitter Linkedin The latest rent report from Apartment List shows that national median rents rose in May with month-over-month rent growth of 0.54 percent, the lowest rate since 2020. Year-over-year rent growth remained negative at -1.45 percent. Apartment List reported the national median apartment rent to be $1,379, up $8 from last month’s revised figure.
